name: news@wilmotcollins.com
subject: Steve Daines slammed by hometown paper: "Voters deserve face-to-face accessibility"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
It is totally unacceptable that Steve Daines won't hold town halls with Montanans.
_The Bozeman Daily Chronicle_ published an editorial recently calling on Steve Daines to host town halls to meet with the people of our state and listen to our concerns. It's outrageous that Daines has been so hard to find.
From the editorial:
_Sen. Jon Tester has conducted these town halls regularly. Sen. Steve Daines and Rep. Greg Gianforte have been remiss in this area. As Republicans, Daines and Gianforte will undoubtedly be asked to justify their support for President Trump 's inflammatory words and policies to some constituents who oppose them. But that's part of the job._
**[Unlike Steve Daines, Wilmot Collins will always meet with Montana voters, listen to their stories, and stand up and fight for their families and principles every day in the Senate. But he needs our support to get there. Contribute $5, or whatever you can, now.](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190811&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Like the editorial board of his hometown paper, we agree that Steve Daines should make himself "accessible" and "transparent" by meeting face-to-face, regularly, with Montana voters.
Another quote from the editorial:
_That doesn 't mean "telephone town halls" in which questions are screened. That doesn't mean "roundtables" where participants are carefully selected to participate. We're talking face-to-face meetings where all participants and questions are welcome._
But we also know we can't count on Daines to make time for the people of Montana. He's too busy pleasing his wealthy donors, special interests, and his extreme leader, Mitch McConnell.
**[Montanans deserve a Senator who meets with them face-to-face, just like Wilmot is doing on the campaign trail. Will you chip in $5 to send him to the Senate to fight for us?](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190811&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190811&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: What in the Hill was he thinking?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
This election is about right and wrong. This past week, we witnessed the horrific end results of politicians fanning the flames of discrimination. If you don't believe me, listen to the words that came out of the mouth of the first Republican to jump in the race for Texas' 22nd District, now that Pete Olson has withdrawn.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/YYBwQvdE7fZyL2N0bm5ElON7X3cdo8D5Vp0_4jDQNEM=)

Loving v. Virginia is the monumental Supreme Court case that overturned the law banning interracial marriages. If not for this decision, my parents would not have been able to get married in the United States. Greg Hill said that this decision was wrong.

To be clear, if Loving v. Virginia was decided the other way, I would not have been born. We have witnessed so much open bigotry in our politics over the last few years, it has become normalized. [**I need your help to make sure that we don 't normalize bigotry and more.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/VZ4DJn7BUHMQTehLAfE3u9fr-0bE4QmA7wjqji7h5TM=?refcode=0812)

This District is one of the most diverse in the country. People deserve representation by someone who believes in and will protect diversity.

Love doesn't see race or orientation. Unfortunately, there are others who do. [This is why I'm asking you to step up again and help me.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/VZ4DJn7BUHMQTehLAfE3u9fr-0bE4QmA7wjqji7h5TM=?refcode=0812)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/VZ4DJn7BUHMQTehLAfE3u9fr-0bE4QmA7wjqji7h5TM=?refcode=0812)

In solidarity,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/VZ4DJn7BUHMQTehLAfE3u9fr-0bE4QmA7wjqji7h5TM=?refcode=0812)

_(Sri with his parents)_

* * *

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/mIy2Xm8ea1tJ51gSp-1Kgj9Ua8zBVoTN2sUQtY1c6Cs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HQKsWBd9_BwywA0lEn5joG0Ol_twZXFCwiHrFG6KWuA=/kX9wmPodOCPR2QabB1tU3GcGYYMFwAqjhO0uPyFId0g=)

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made enormous progress.

I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, so every step I take in this journey is because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

| My friend, The price of insulin has tripled over the last ten years, forcing as many as one in four diabetics to resort to rationing their life-saving prescriptions. As prices skyrocket and Minnesotans suffer, pharmaceutical companies are raking in profit. That is unacceptable. It's time to make sure Minnesotans in need of emergency insulin never again have to worry whether or not they can afford it. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LKWjvgZDKJwdQx0agJ0InugmoMDvCA8zJH-6KU-445E=/lA4_PSKLwQ79jtKkqXQ96c9ZwbNE7dfjw7dy_rZOMhQ=)

My friend,
The price of insulin has tripled over the last ten years, forcing as many as one in four diabetics to resort to rationing their life-saving prescriptions.
As prices skyrocket and Minnesotans suffer, pharmaceutical companies are raking in profit.
**That is unacceptable.** It's time to make sure Minnesotans in need of emergency insulin never again have to worry whether or not they can afford it.
The House DFL and I agree that we need to hold drug companies accountable and fund emergency insulin with a fee on drugmakers, but the Senate GOP continues to drag their feet.
Minnesotans can't afford to wait any longer. That's why I'm hoping you'll help me increase the pressure today:
[**Add your name right now and tell the Senate GOP: Put the health and well-being of Minnesotans ahead of Big Pharma. Support our common-sense funding solution so we can get this done immediately.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LKWjvgZDKJwdQx0agJ0InugmoMDvCA8zJH-6KU-445E=/lA4_PSKLwQ79jtKkqXQ96c9ZwbNE7dfjw7dy_rZOMhQ=)

Once the Senate Republicans come to the table and do the right thing, I'll call a special session so we can provide much-needed relief to so many Minnesotans struggling to afford their insulin.

Help me keep the pressure on so we can get this done.[Add your name and tell the Senate GOP: Hold Big Pharma accountable and pass emergency insulin for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/LKWjvgZDKJwdQx0agJ0InugmoMDvCA8zJH-6KU-445E=/lA4_PSKLwQ79jtKkqXQ96c9ZwbNE7dfjw7dy_rZOMhQ=)**

Tim Walz

clean_body: "" "" Hi there, My name is Theresa Greenfield and I'm a business leader, a farm kid, and I have a plan to beat Joni Ernst in 2020. But now, with The Washington Post ranking our race as one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip, all eyes -- including from dark money groups -- are on Iowa. The GOP has dark money groups lining up to spend big against me and corporate special interests filling my opponent's re-election war chest, and they won't hesitate to spend that money on ads attacking me. But my team and I have something they don't: You. "" I'm running because it's time to elect a leader who will fight for the middle class. I'm committed to protecting essential programs like Social Security and Medicare and investing in education and small businesses -- I'm ready to work for hardworking families, not special interests. Our Senate race is shaping up to be one of the closest and most important in the country. It's up to us to make sure we have the resources to grow our grassroots team and spread our plans to bring Iowa values to Washington -- but I can't do it alone. "" Thank you, Theresa Greenfield ""

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It has been almost two years since the Equifax data breach that compromised the personal data of more than 143 million Americans.
|
---
| | | _**Will you share your thoughts on data security?**_

**8 Questions
Response from dpwillis67@gmail.com: **Not Yet
****[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d193/53d9897e/511a34a2/1c8e4cce/2309634891/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-datasecurity")****
---
Derek,

It has been almost two years since the Equifax data breach that compromised the personal data of more than 143 million Americans. And while this might seem like the distant past to many of us, thousands of individuals are still dealing with the disastrous effects of having their data stolen.

Personal information is more valuable than ever, and in today's information economy, we need to be able to trust that our data will be safe with large credit reporting agencies such as Equifax. And if they fail us, they must face real consequences.

**That 's why I introduced the Data Breach Prevention and Compensation act along with my colleague Elizabeth Warren.** This act defends the rights of consumers through two promises:

1) If your data is stolen, you deserve to be compensated.

2) And if a credit reporting agency failed to protect your data, they deserve to be held accountable.

It's that simple.

I'm determined to protect your personal information, and stop irresponsible lapses in data security. But as I push forward, I want to hear from you. **[Will you take the survey and let me know your thoughts and experiences with data breaches?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d193/53d9897e/511a34a2/1c8e4cce/2309634891/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-datasecurity")**

-- Mark

subject: I am personally asking you to donate today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
We’re about to finish up our bus tour across Iowa and I wanted to see if you could spare one more moment for me to personally ask you to make a contribution to our campaign. As I told you the other day, August is a notoriously difficult month for fundraising -- and this one has been no exception. The difference, however, is that after I asked you to step up -- we had one of our best fundraising days in weeks. But we’re still behind where we had hoped to be at this point in August, and if we don’t get back on track soon, my team is going to have to make some tough budget and staffing decisions. So we’re setting a goal of raising $250,000 in grassroots donations before midnight on Friday. ---
| | |
###
Bigotry, hate, and unspeakable violence came to El Paso. The mass shooting was inspired, in part, by Trump's racist rhetoric.

But out of the tragedy came displays of unity, love and compassion. In the face of hate, the community came together to mourn, to support each other, and to prove El Paso's strength lies in its celebration of diversity, tolerance and unity.

True leadership was also on display in El Paso. Beto O'Rourke has proven to be the genuine unifier, steadfast voice against hate and a leader stepping up to the plate as our country faces a leadership vacuum in Washington.

We need more leaders like this in Texas and in Washington. We need new voices that understand what is at stake for our democracy. We need new leaders that don't play politics but are standing up at this critical time for our great nation.

A former journalist with a proven track record of using the microphone to sound the alarm at critical moments, Liz Wahl is the type of leader we need to represent us in Washington.

But as a political newcomer, she needs your help. Please contribute what you can to help send new leaders to Washington. El Paso has shown us what true leadership looks like. Let's work to elect more leaders working to make today and the next generations, brighter, stronger, and unified.

Please chip in what you can to help send Liz Wahl to Congress. The 23rd District now swings blue after Will Hurd announced he is retiring. Texas can be a model for change, and Texas' 23rd District can be part of leading this movement.

[Contribute here to send new leaders like Liz to Washington. Every contribution counts in this grassroots campaign. ](https://twitter.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=004218d27cababe4c94f00355&id=b478243d10&e=c901a073c7)

| We want to hear from you, please take a look Friend,

Here at Our Revolution HQ, we're happy to see more Democratic presidential candidates joining Senator Sanders in calling out the media for repeatedly asking loaded questions filled with right wing talking points.

[**Take our Corporate Media Survey to let us know what you think about how the media talks about progressive policies like Medicare for All ->**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0819-media-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Take+our+Corporate+Media+Survey+to+let+u&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1")

Progressive policy ideas like health care as a human right have been attacked by the corporate media for decades. But in the years since Bernie kickstarted our political revolution, we've completely changed the national conversation around these issues by organizing locally nationwide and ensuring that voters hear the truth.

**The truth is, ideas like Medicare for All have always been popular with the American people,** and our grassroots organizing over the last three years has helped make that fact unavoidable for the Democratic party.

[**Let us know what you think the media 's role should be in informing voters about increasingly popular policies like Medicare for All.**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0819-media-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Let+us+know+what+you+think+the+mediarsqu&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1") **[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0819-media-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1")** If the media refuses to do their job and help Americans understand the difference between "centrist" health care policies and Medicare for All so they can determine which candidates support the issues they care about, it's on us to have those conversations with voters ourselves.

**The media is not going to make Medicare for All happen.** Not even President Sanders will be able to accomplish our ambitious policy goals alone. It's going to take an unprecedented and sustained grassroots movement powered by people like you for months and years to come.

[**Answer our Corporate Media Survey now and let us know if you agree that voters need to hear the truth about Medicare for All ->**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a387/bed43eb/aa42adee/75fa77b8/1489460225/VEsC/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0819-media-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+Answer+our+Corporate+Media+Survey+now+an&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190812_1_1")

Thanks for speaking out.

-- Our Revolution HQ

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here's what I'll do as president to invest in rural America:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I've got a plan to restore opportunity in rural communities by ensuring access to health care, creating a public option for high-speed Internet, building a new farm economy... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285296aa/45c30650/1548292ef/668270b8/1899915999/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
No matter where you live in America, you should have the opportunity to thrive. But as giant corporations and Washington keep cutting off opportunities for huge parts of the country, the shot to succeed gets further out of reach for rural families.

Student loan debt is forcing young people to take jobs in big cities just to pay the bills. Big broadband companies are excluding entire communities -- especially tribal communities and rural communities of color -- from access to high-speed Internet. And more and more people are driving longer distances just to see a doctor.

**Our failure to invest in rural areas is holding back millions of families, weakening our economy, and undermining our efforts to combat climate change. It 's time to fix this.

I've got a plan to restore opportunity in rural communities by ensuring access to health care, creating a public option for high-speed Internet, building a new farm economy that doesn't just work for Big Ag, fighting climate change, creating and defending rural jobs, and more.**

**[Add your name to be a part of the fight to make this plan happen.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285296aa/45c30650/1548292ef/668270bb/1899915999/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUkyNVBfUkxUX1JSUl9FXzIwMTkwODEyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-rural-policy?source=EMI25P_RLT_RRR_E_20190812_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's what I'll do as president to invest in rural America:
1. **Protect access to health care in rural communities.**

Barriers to coverage, disappearing health facilities and a shortage of health professionals are denying people in rural America the care they deserve. In less than a decade, 112 rural hospitals have closed, with hundreds more teetering on the edge.

As president, I will make sure everyone is not only covered under Medicare for All but also has access to the care they need. That means investing in rural doctors, rural hospitals, and community health centers and it also means blocking hospital mergers that result in higher costs, worse care, and more closures.

2. **Create a public option for broadband.**

Today, Internet providers virtually ignore huge parts of the country. Not only that, they have deliberately restricted competition, kept prices high, and used their armies of lobbyists to convince state legislatures to ban local governments from building their own public networks. This ends in a Warren Administration.

I will create a public option for broadband because every home deserves affordable access to the internet in the 21st century. I'll finally make it clear that towns and cities have the right to build their own broadband networks, and I'll create a new Office of Broadband Access to manage the $85 billion we put towards making sure everyone has affordable fiber connections.

3. **Build a new farm economy.**

For decades, government policy has subsidized industrial agriculture at taxpayers' expense and lined the pockets of Big Ag. Meanwhile, giant corporations squeeze family farmers on both sides -- forcing them to pay high prices for inputs like seeds and fertilizer, and driving commodity prices so low they don't even cover farmers' costs.

Farmers are stewards of the land, but agriculture has become one of the biggest polluters in our economy. They know this system is unsustainable -- but without a change in incentives, they have no other choice but to overproduce just to try to break even.

Here's my new approach: Guaranteeing farmers a fair price for their goods by paying farmers at cost of production for whatever they can't sell on the market. This approach will raise farm incomes and still cost taxpayers billions less than we currently pay in subsidies.

We'll pay farmers for sustainable farming that protects our environment. My plan will make it economically feasible for farmers to be part of the climate change solution -- and help achieve the goals of the Green New Deal.

4. **Build economic security in rural America.**

My Universal Child Care plan will make sure there are high-quality child care options available in every community -- including home-based child care services, which rural families are more likely to use. My housing plan invests $523 million to create 380,000 affordable rental homes in rural areas. And my student loan debt cancelation plan will mean that recent graduates won't need to flock to urban centers to find jobs that will help them pay down these loans.

We also need to do more to bring high-quality jobs back to rural areas and small towns and negotiate trade agreements that keep jobs in the U.S. -- instead of shipping them overseas. That's why I've committed to creating a National Jobs Strategy focused specifically on trends that disproportionately affect rural areas.

And, I will spend $2 trillion in green research, manufacturing, and exporting to create more than a million new jobs, reversing the manufacturing losses that many rural communities have experienced over the last two decades.

**We can make sure that kids in every corner of our country have the opportunities they need to succeed -- right there in their own hometowns.**

Here's the bottom line: A strong America requires a strong rural America.

**[Add your name to support our plan and say you're ready to invest in a brighter future for our rural communities.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285296aa/45c30650/1548292ef/668270bb/1899915999/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUkyNVBfUkxUX1JSUl9FXzIwMTkwODEyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-rural-policy?source=EMI25P_RLT_RRR_E_20190812_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Save Bears Ears »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ps6qc0EjngJsNAJRaB048oky1nFIHM26Uo5gS5rRoc0=/mh9wGXBfn-6uMOoAmuBEQo5p4isA3PZgzl1YUuPQDw8=)

Our nation's beautiful national parks and monuments are timeless treasures that _must be preserved_.

**Sadly, the Administration 's Bureau of Land Management has announced plans to sell off some of these public lands to Big Oil and other Special Interests.**

This includes Bears Ears National Monument, which is sacred to local indigenous communities and home to critical wildlife populations.

**That 's why I'm stepping up in Congress to protect our national parks from fracking and mining.**

subject: I'm asking you to please read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:

|
---

| | I'm livid. Mitch McConnell just announced that he will not bring the Senate back into session to pass essential, life-saving common sense gun reform.
[**I 'm asking you to sign your name next to mine now to condemn McConnell's dangerous inaction and demand he bring these bills up for a vote. It's urgent. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8278c/232dfd1/9e777f7/62a124a5/2308094045/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-gun-reform-bill-petition-2?source=20190812_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

Sometimes I can't believe we're still debating this. But then I remember -- the NRA, the gun lobby, and wealthy donors fund the campaigns of McConnell and his cowardly lackeys. My Republican opponent, Cory Gardner, is one of the top recipients of NRA money -- almost $4 million. They line his pockets, and he does their bidding. Just days after the shootings in Dayton and El Paso last week, he said: "I don't support gun control." As someone who grew up less than a mile from Columbine **_\-- and frankly, as a human being --_** putting politics above human lives is abhorrent to me. Republicans like McConnell and Gardner are unfit to run the Senate. Full stop. **We need to force their hand.**
[**I 'm calling for a massive surge of support -- 5,000 signatures before midnight -- to demand McConnell cut the Senate's vacation short and pass this critical gun violence legislation immediately. Can I count on your signature? >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8278c/232dfd1/9e777f7/62a124a5/2308094045/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-gun-reform-bill-petition-2?source=20190812_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

It's now up to us to rise up and address the gun violence epidemic with the urgency this moment demands. Thank you,

Dan |

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: How Ron Wyden saved a life and shined a light on a great cruelty:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | | My friend and Oregon partner in the Senate, Ron Wyden, is a _hero_. **He recently traveled to Ju arez, Mexico with Oregonians, including a doctor, to shine a light on a horrific aspect of Trump's immigration policy: the lack of adequate medical care for asylum seekers and other refugees.** Then something startling happened: at the shelter for asylum seekers, Ron and his team encountered a pregnant woman who was stuck in Juarez. They were unable to cross due to Trump's illegal policies. She was facing serious medical complications related to her pregnancy and the doctor saw clearly that both she and her unborn child were in grave danger. They sprang into action: after she was initially rejected (_illegally,_ by the way) and told, "we're full", Ron presented his Senate identification and the border guards suddenly changed their minds - recognizing they needed to follow the law. The young woman was allowed into the facility and eventually got appropriate medical treatment. I agree with Ron: **_i _**t**_ shouldn't take being accompanied by a U.S. Senator for asylum seekers to get the emergency medical care they need._** **Read the story in Ron's own words below, and[then join me in urging Congress to end the cruelty facing migrants, asylum seekers, and refugees.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7fa/3204110027/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/cruelty-act/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-08-cruelty-act-email")** **_Jeff_** Forwarded Message [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7fb/3204110027/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.standtallforamerica.com")
Last week, I went to the border and to Juarez, Mexico with immigration advocates and experts from Oregon to see the horrors of this administration's immigration policy firsthand. **I'm equally heartbroken and enraged: conditions are not only as grim as we've heard, but about as cruel as we can imagine.** Our team - including a pediatrician from Springfield, Dr. Lauren Herbert, Stephen Manning, a lawyer from the Innovation Law Lab, Ian Philabaum of Innovation Law Lab, and my Rabbi, Michael Cahana - went to Juarez to meet with asylum seekers shut out of our country by Trump's "Remain in Mexico" policy. [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7f8/3204110027/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/wyden/posts/10156740982507858") There, we heard from people who fled their homes because of the gang violence and government corruption that caused them to fear for their lives and the lives of their small children. They told us of the treacherous journey to the United States, through kidnappings and witnessing gruesome violence and the heartless slaughter of innocents by gangs and cartels. Risking their lives time and time again - only to be turned away when they finally arrived at the USA. **We also met a young woman, thirty-eight weeks pregnant, fleeing from violence in Guerrero, Mexico with her husband and three year old child.** She told us about her difficult pregnancy, and recent alarming complications. Dr. Herbert immediately realized that if we didn't get her to a hospital, both mother and baby might die. We brought her to the border crossing, where officers told her they were "full," even though immigration law forbids sending refugees back to the country they're fleeing. It wasn't until I showed my Senate ID badge that they finally granted the family their rights, allowed them to pass, and made sure the mother received the medical care she needs. **It shouldn't take being accompanied by a US Senator for asylum seekers to get the emergency medical care they need and not have their rights denied.** The family we met was heard only because they happened to meet a visiting U.S. Senator that day at their shelter in Juarez - and that's not something that has ever happened to these asylum seekers. People are being unjustly shut out of our country, being denied the care they need, and are losing their lives because of Donald Trump's zero-tolerance, greatest-malice immigration policies. [**Head over to Facebook to join our conversation on conditions at the border, the human rights violations committed in our name by this administration, and what you can do to support the families in crisis.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7f8/3204110027/VEsC/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/wyden/posts/10156740982507858") _Ron_ [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7f8/3204110027/VEsD/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/wyden/posts/10156740982507858") |

This email was sent by **[Jeff Merkley for Oregon](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7f6/3204110027/VEsB/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")**

If you no longer want to hear from Senator Merkley, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7f4/3204110027/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [Contact us here.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dacd/6cd27893/50f9d79f/1580d7f5/3204110027/VEsHBQ/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com/contact/")

clean_body: | | | | | Friend -- What’s been clear from the start of this campaign is that we’re different. We’re prioritizing humanity first, rooted in the fact that as the wealthiest, most advanced country in the world, there is more than enough to go around. The problem is the distribution of that wealth, and for far too long our leaders have not prioritized or invested in everyday Americans. Investing in you -- that’s exactly what Andrew Yang will do when he’s elected. We call it the Freedom Dividend -- $1,000 per month for every American adult. Think it’s far-fetched or too good to be true? Well, we’ve done the math! The money is there -- we just need to have the courage to see it through. That’s where you come in. Every time we’ve asked, this team has stepped up. But the truth is we need to build this campaign even bigger -- more offices, more organizers, and more ads to targeted voters. We know that it’s not an easy decision to donate to a political campaign, so know whatever you can afford to donate is a real investment. Thank you for everything, Yang 2020 | | | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. Join the Yang Gang! If you want to get more involved and help fuel this movement, please . | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. Friend, Bill took the campaign to the Iowa State Fair this past weekend, and he wasn’t afraid to tell the crowd and the media the unvarnished truth: _“[Trump]’s not a fiscal conservative. He doesn’t believe in conserving the environment. He doesn’t believe in free trade. He doesn’t believe in all the things the real Republican Party used to stand for.**So I’m unapologetic about challenging him here, because I don’t think he’s a real Republican.** ”_ But Bill didn’t stop there — he went on to tell the media that President Trump is an “**extreme racist** ,” and that if we want the Republican Party to avoid massive defeats in 2020, folks in Washington need to “**expressly disavow his racist tirades**.” And that’s the truth. The Republican Party is headed towards extinction. We are a party built around the ego and whims of a racist narcissist who uses **our work** to enrich his businesses and boost his ego. That’s why we’re in this race. We want to bring the Republican Party back to its roots. We want our party to stand for the things real Republicans stand for, like free trade, fiscal conservatism, and self-reliance. We want to build a party to unite our country, not divide it. But we can’t build this movement alone. [**Can you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help us build an infrastructure to reform the Republican Party?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARwUsc8MJfnf8ECUtEhsJOFE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190812_fr&n=1) Thanks for standing with us,
